transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
I prepared Chinese cuisine today
I think I've done this same mukbang before
I'm doing it again since that video is gone too
Let's do them 1 by 1
Anyways, this is tangsuyuk (Fried Pork with Sweet and Sour Sauce)
And this is a huge bowl of jjajangmyun (Black Bean Noodles)
And this is jjamppong soup (Spicy Seafood Noodles Soup)
I have the sweet & sour sauce here
I like pouring it on top
I just like eating in any way
I'll pour half
Just half
Let's mix it up
The noodles are not bloated yet It mixes well
It's all over my hand

The sweet & sour is spilling out
What do I do?
Turn it like this
Looks good
Bon appetit
I found this local place that has good jjajangmyun
So good
[Chat: Cut it]
You don't cut these
It cuts as I bring it to my bowl anyway
This place has the best jjajangmyun
Behind the ears for today
It gets in the way
It's hard to scoop
It's heavy
It's incredible how I can eat all this weight

It's not bloated, it's good
It looks like it, but it's not It's delicious
Their tangsuyuk is tasty too
So yummy
It's spilling
Move here
These are thinly sliced pickled radish
Right, I had the soup
Yum
Should I pour some in here?
[Chat: How many servings is that?] It's a secret. Guess
I think it's bigger than the Monster one (challenge)
So many of you are asking for the serving size It's 1-serving for me
I'm so happy to have found this place
This place is great
What's weird is that

I didn't really have a preference when I was younger
But now, it's pretty hard to find a restaurant that's good
Is it because kids just eat whatever that's given?
There's just too much sauce here
I've been surprised by watching my old videos
My chopstick can go in pretty deep
Carrots..
I'm not too sure why it's divided into Pouring the sauce vs Dipping the sauce
If the pork is very crispy, dipping is better
That's why people dip
If it's not as crispy, pouring is better, no?
The non-crispy tangsuyuk can get really chewy and tasty if you pour the sauce on it
It can get messy eating these noodles
I really like the color when the sauce is poured in
There's not much jjajangmyun left
It's a little iffy to mix the rice in my own bowl of noodles

after seeing the video that shows how much of your saliva is in there
Where's Jingu today?
Jingu~
Jingu, do you want some snacks?
He's already here
He's waiting for it
Oh no
I'm sorry, I tricked you
Sorry
Jingu
Are you mad?
Did you guys hear that?
He just went like that
No, he's not mad He's purring
These are all vegetables
Too much

How many servings is the Monster bowl? 4-servings?
It was pretty small Like 2-servings
Why is his upper lip moving like this?
Really
Is he angry?
He's not
He's happy
It moves like this with a strange sound
[Chat: It's poison if you eat apples at night]
This is an apple?
There are no more noodles left
Just small pieces
Do I need to eat the veggies?
I don't want to
They closed already It's my 2nd job (Since she's a regular)
Well as for the chunks that are left..

I'm not good at eating vegetables
So I'll end it here
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
